CLAUSE.NAME: Advice_Narrative_Refuse
CLAUSE.value: Reference is made to your reimbursement claim MT742 dd......claiming [[[CLM_CCY]]] [[[CLM_TRX_CCY_AMT]]], value.., under L/C no. [[[LC_NO]]],issued by [[[ISSUE_BK_NM]]], [[[ISSUE_BK_ADD1]]]. Please be informed, that [[[ISSUE_BK_NM]]] , [[[ISSUE_BK_ADD1]]] , has withdrawn their reimbursement authorization. Thus, we consider your claim as null and void.. We closed our file.
